headline: 'Paramount Seeks FCC Approval To Permit Foreign Investors To Indirectly Hold In Excess Of 25% Paramount's Equity As Part Of Warner Bros Deal Funding' - Reuters News
summary: Paramount is seeking approval from the U.S. Federal Trade Commission to permit foreign investors to indirectly hold in excess of 25% of the company's equity after seeking foreign investment to help fund its acquisition

headline: EU broadcasters say Digital Fairness Act should target Big Tech, not them
summary: Europe’s biggestbroadcasters and media groups warned EU regulators that aplanned law to curb unfair digital practices should target BigTech, not publishers and broadcasters already heavily...
